programme.title: Fighting Rendegade 1939.
programme.desc: A determined lawman sets out to capture a notorious outlaw who has been terrorizing the frontier. As he tracks the renegade across the rugged West, he uncovers betrayal and deception that complicate the pursuit and threaten the safety of the local community

programme.title: Riders of the Whistling Pines (1949
programme.desc: A group of singing cowboys sets out to protect a forest reserve from a gang of criminals using sabotage and intimidation to seize control of valuable timberland

programme.title: Honor Of The Range - 1934
programme.desc: A singing cowboy rides into a troubled frontier community where corruption and deception threaten honest ranchers. As he uncovers a scheme involving land and cattle, he uses both his charm and courage to expose the villains and restore justice on the range.

programme.title: Songs and Saddles (1938)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy becomes involved in a range dispute when a group of outlaws tries to force settlers off their land. Using his musical charm and sharpshooting skills, he works to protect the innocent and bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: Saddle Mountain Roundup (1941)
programme.desc: A determined rancher and his allies stand up against a group of outlaws attempting to seize control of valuable land near Saddle Mountain. As tensions rise, courage and quick thinking are put to the test in a battle to protect rightful ownership and restore peace to the range

programme.title: Django, Kill!
programme.desc: Various factions, including a half-breed bandit, a gang of homosexual cowboys, and a priest, feud over stolen gold in a surreal town.

programme.title: Dan Candy's Law
programme.desc: Based on an actual event, this is the tragic story of Saskatchewan fugitive Almighty Voice, a Cree Indian who is arrested for stealing government livestock out of desperate hunger.

programme.title: Four of the Apocalypse 1975
programme.desc: In Four of the Apocalypse, director Lucio Fulci delivers a gritty and haunting Spaghetti Western. After a crooked sheriff banishes four misfits—a gambler, a prostitute, a drunk, and a simple-minded man—they journey across a lawless frontier searching for survival and redemption. But their path collides with a sadistic bandit, plunging them into violence, cruelty, and despair. Blending raw brutality with moments of tenderness, this bleak tale explores the struggle for humanity in a world gone savage.

programme.title: This Man Can't Die
programme.desc: Bounty hunter Martin Benson seeks the leader of a vicious outlaw smuggler gang who killed his parents and raped his sister, while his other siblings hide a wounded gang member in hopes of more info and try to help.

programme.title: Raiders of Red Gap 1943
programme.desc: In Raiders of Red Gap, the Range Busters ride into action when a ruthless gang plots to seize control of a frontier town. Crash Corrigan, Dusty King, and Alibi Terhune team up to outwit the outlaws with fast guns, daring stunts, and plenty of grit. With danger around every corner—and a touch of Alibi’s trademark humor—this action-packed Western gallops straight into classic Range Busters territory.
